arts.ttl: This Week In Lazio History: April 14-20
arts.sum: The April 14-20 games became ever so important as the seasons approached their end. There were Scudetto hopes in 1974 and 2000, a promotion to be reached in 1969, and a fourth place to consolidate in 1950. We also remember one of Lazio’s legends: Luigi Saraceni. arts.ttl: Genoa vs Lazio | Serie A Preview | Where to Watch, Form Guide, Insights, Lineups
arts.sum: After their European heartbreak, Lazio will be eager to finish their Serie A campaign on a high note, and their final gauntlet begins with an away fixture in Genoa.
